items.title: Beatbot’s Prime Day Sale + bonus savings drops entire lineup of robot pool cleaners to new lows starting from $284
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day Sale event, Beatbot has its own Prime Day Sale with new low prices on many robot pool cleaners – plus, a bonus sitewide 5% savings code. Of course, plenty of people already know my favorite pick is the newest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner down at $949.99 shipped, after using the code AFF5 at checkout, beating out Amazon by $50. It’s starting off down from its $1,499 MSRP to $999, which already sets a new low price, but the savings get even better when tacking on the additional $50 savings after using the code, making this more accessible pool cleaner even more affordable. You can get my in-depth hands-on experience of what it’s been up to in my family’s pool here, with the full lineup of deals available below.

items.summary:
Carlinkit Mini Ultra Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto Adapter

Buy for $36 (Reg. $50)

What we love

This thumbnail-sized adapter can turn your car’s wired-only Apple CarPlay or Android Auto connection into a wireless setup. Plug it into the USB port once, and your phone should connect automatically whenever you start the car – no cable needed. It is smaller than most thumb drive-style options, so it will not stick out as much from the dash, while retaining factory controls and microphone support.

items.summary:
HOTO 25-bit Electric Screwdriver Kit

Buy for $28.50 (Reg. $40)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This Hoto electric screwdriver is small enough to keep in a drawer or car trunk, but it still has enough power for everyday jobs like assembling furniture, fixing small appliances, or working on bikes and scooters. The kit includes 25 steel bits and an extension bar, plus three torque settings for lighter electronics work or tougher screws. It also has a USB-C rechargeable 1,500mAh battery and a built-in LED light for working in darker spaces.
